about.text: I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience in building scalable web applications. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive designs.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured online store with real-time inventory and Stripe integration.

projects.title: AI Content Generator
projects.description: SaaS application using OpenAI API to generate marketing copy and blog posts.

content.name: Kirana
content.textContent:
Project: Kirana Grocery Delivery App

Full-Stack Next.js + TypeScript grocery delivery platform designed for local kirana stores with multiple user roles.

Features:
- Three user roles: User, Admin, Delivery Agent
- Real-time maps and live location tracking
- OTP based order delivery verification
- Real-time chat using Socket.IO
- Secure payments with Stripe

Tech Stack:
- Frontend: Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express
- State: Redux
- Maps: Leaflet
- Realtime: Socket.IO
- Auth: Google OAuth, NextAuth, OTP login
- Media: Cloudinary
- Charts: Recharts

Live Link:
https://kirana-eta.vercel.app/

content.name: WallPaperBot
content.textContent:
Project: WallPaperBot

Full-Stack MERN wallpaper platform with role based access for Owners and Users.

Features:
- Secure authentication with JWT and Firebase Auth
- Image uploads using Cloudinary + Multer
- Role based access system
- Wallpaper browsing and uploading system

Tech Stack:
- Frontend: ReactJS, Redux, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express
- Database: MongoDB
- Media Storage: Cloudinary

Live Link:
https://wallpaperbotproject-1.onrender.com/

content.name: BotWears
content.textContent:
Project: BotWears

Full-Stack MERN E-Commerce platform with Admin and User dashboards.

Features:
- Product filters, search, and recommendations
- Admin dashboard for product and inventory management
- Google OAuth login
- JWT based authentication
- AI voice navigation system

Tech Stack:
- Frontend: ReactJS, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express
- Database: MongoDB
- Auth: Google OAuth + JWT

Live Link:
https://botwearsfullstack-frontendone.onrender.com/

content.name: UpToSkills — MERN Intern
content.textContent:
Internship: MERN Full-Stack Developer Intern
Company: UpToSkills
Duration: Dec 2025 – Present
Type: Full-Stack Development

Responsibilities:
- Contributing to the company's AI Resume Builder product, focusing on the Admin Panel.
- Enhanced frontend and backend features including UI design, dashboard creation, and data management.
- Designed and integrated REST APIs for seamless data flow in the dashboard.
- Enhanced the CV creation module ensuring smooth interaction between frontend and backend.

Tech Stack:
- MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js (MERN)
- Redux, Tailwind CSS, Axios, REST APIs

Status: Currently Active

content.name: GUVI (HCL Group) — ML Intern
